RotatingFileHandler that compresses old log files using gzip.

methods.name: apv.apv.LoggerSetup.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the LoggerSetup with provided parameters.

```
param level

The logging level (e.g., 'DEBUG', 'INFO', 'WARNING', 'ERROR', 'CRITICAL').

param date_format

The date format for log messages.

param log_to_disk

Whether to log to disk.

param max_log_size

The maximum size of log files before rotation.

param max_backups

The maximum number of backup log files to keep.

param log_file_name

The base name of the log file.

param json_log

Whether to log in JSON format.

param show_details

Whether to show detailed log messages.

param compress_backups

Whether to compress old log files using gzip.

param enable_graylog

Whether to enable Graylog logging.

param graylog_host

The Graylog host.

param graylog_port

The Graylog port.

param enable_cloudwatch

Whether to enable CloudWatch logging.

param cloudwatch_group_name

The CloudWatch log group name.

param cloudwatch_stream_name

The CloudWatch log stream name.
```
